input_messages.content: {"suggestions": ["Deploy an inline Snort IPS between the internal network and the internet to detect and block exfiltration attempts based on patterns of large file uploads or known C2 signatures.", "Configure the Fortigate firewall to enable Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies that block outbound transfers of sensitive file types (e.g., PNG, YML, archive files) over HTTPS.", "Harden the Ubuntu host by implementing application whitelisting (e.g., AppArmor) to restrict the sandcat agent process from executing unauthorized commands such as find, cp, tar, and curl."], "chosen_mitigation": "Deploy an inline Snort IPS between the internal network and the internet to detect and block exfiltration attempts based on patterns of large file uploads or known C2 signatures.", "no_mitigation_left": false, "current_mitigations_counter": 1, "reached_mitigation_limit": false}

response.content: {"suggestions": ["Deploy an inline Snort IPS between the internal network and the internet to detect and block exfiltration attempts based on patterns of large file uploads or known C2 signatures.", "Configure the Fortigate firewall to enable Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies that block outbound transfers of sensitive file types (e.g., PNG, YML, archive files) over HTTPS.", "Harden the Ubuntu host by implementing application whitelisting (e.g., AppArmor) to restrict the sandcat agent process from executing unauthorized commands such as find, cp, tar, and curl."], "chosen_mitigation": "Deploy an inline Snort IPS between the internal network and the internet to detect and block exfiltration attempts based on patterns of large file uploads or known C2 signatures.", "no_mitigation_left": false, "current_mitigations_counter": 1, "reached_mitigation_limit": false}
